dataset: Cuyahoga County Local Emergency Planning Committee

pi_items.metadata_value: Cuyahoga County Local Emergency Planning Committee
pi_items.verified_value: Cuyahoga County Local Emergency Planning Committee

pi_items.source: Official Cuyahoga County LEPC website shows address as 9300 Quincy Ave, Cleveland, OH 44106

Official Cuyahoga County LEPC website (https://cuyahogacounty.gov/ready/lepc) lists LEPC/Hazmat Info as 216-443-7597. The metadata phone 216-443-5700 is the number for Cuyahoga County Office of Emergency Management (which provides staff support to LEPC), not the LEPC itself.

Web search of CAMEO Data Manager documentation and installation paths shows default path as C:\Users\Public\Documents\CAMEO Data (not 'CAMEO Data Manager' folder). The .mer file format is from legacy CAMEOfm software, while CAMEO Data Manager 4.5.1 uses CSV and ZIP formats. Path appears to be incorrect or based on legacy software.

Official Cuyahoga County LEPC website (https://cuyahogacounty.gov/ready/lepc) and Office of Emergency Management website (https://cuyahogacounty.gov/ready/about-us). 323 Lakeside Avenue is a commercial office building housing Gallagher Insurance, not a government office.
Official Cuyahoga County LEPC address lists 44106. While 44113 is a valid Cleveland zip code, it does not match the LEPC office location.

Cuyahoga County LEPC About Us page (https://cuyahogacounty.gov/ready/lepc/about-us) lists Scott Broski as Chair. The Office of Emergency Management provides staff support but the LEPC has its own elected leadership.

pi_items.verified_value: Cuyahoga County Office of Emergency Management
pi_items.source: Official Cuyahoga County government websites show 'Cuyahoga County Office of Emergency Management' (part of Department of Public Safety and Justice Services), not 'Cuyahoga County Emergency Services'. No official entity named 'Cuyahoga County Emergency Services' was found.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves configuring LEPC jurisdiction details for the real-world Cuyahoga County Local Emergency Planning Committee in Cleveland, Ohio. Verified facts: The LEPC name is correctly stated as 'Cuyahoga County Local Emergency Planning Committee', the state is OH, and the city is Cleveland. However, several claimed values are inaccurate: The LEPC's actual phone number is (216) 443-7597, not (216) 443-5700; the office is located at 9300 Quincy Avenue (zip 44106), not 323 Lakeside Avenue (zip 44113); and the LEPC Chair is Scott Broski, not simply 'Emergency Management Director'. The data file path 'C:\Users\Public\Documents\CAMEO Data Manager\CAMEOfm.mer' is unverified and appears to reference legacy software paths.
